name: Mindfeeder Crystal
description: Composed of a flat, rough, slate-gray crystal, this weapon seems to absorb your thoughts. When you score a critical hit with a mindfeeder weapon, you gain 1 temporary power point for every 5 points of damage dealt by the critical hit. These temporary power points last for up to 1 minute. You gain power points even if the target has none. As with temporary hit points, temporary power points do not stack with each other; they overlap. Creatures immune to extra damage from critical hits do not trigger mindfeeder weapons. Projectile weapons bestow this property upon their ammunition.
